description_long: This shotgun features a robust, compact design with a double-barrel configuration, both barrels aligned horizontally. The main body and barrels are constructed from dark metal, while the stock and grip are made of a wood-textured material, giving it a classic yet rugged appearance. Blue tape is wrapped around the stock, receiver, and barrel, suggesting field repairs or customization for improved grip. The trigger guard is rounded and moderately sized, providing protection for the trigger area. The shotgun has a break-action mechanism, as indicated by the hinge visible near the receiver. The overall finish is matte with some visible wear, indicating frequent use in urban environments.
description: A compact, double-barrel shotgun with a wooden stock, dark metal barrels, and blue tape wrapped around key areas for grip and reinforcement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the twin barrels aligned side-by-side and the blue tape wrapping the upper barrel and receiver.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wooden stock, blue tape on the grip and barrel, and the break-action hinge near the receiver.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the stock, the twin barrels, and the blue tape securing the grip area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the wooden stock, blue tape, and the break-action hinge, mirroring the details of the other side.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, barrels of equal length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no visible finger grooves or reinforcement
